title: General Tutoring Services
content:
Tutoring Services at Morgan State University

---

Center for Academic Success and Achievement (CASA)
CASA is dedicated to promoting academic success and retention by providing structured support for MSU students. The center offers services such as the CASA Academy Program, First-Year Student Program, Resource/Tutoring Center, and advising for exploratory students. CASA's mission is to support students in achieving their academic and social goals by providing a bridge to where they want to be academically.

NEED A TUTOR?
Visit CASA Appointment Scheduling to make an appointment today!

Tutoring is available:
- In-person: Mondays - Fridays, 9 AM - 5 PM at Tyler Hall 117J
- Online: Google Meet

For more information, visit CASA Tutoring.

---

Academic Enrichment Program (AEP)
AEP supports students' academic success with a focus on providing a holistic college experience. The program offers tutoring services, living and learning communities, leadership development, and personal growth opportunities. AEP's goal is to help students improve study habits, prepare for exams, and foster academic independence.

To schedule a tutoring session, visit AEP Tutoring or contact AEP at aeptutor@morgan.edu.
For more information, email aeptutor@morgan.edu or call 443-885-4452.
AEP Main Office Location: Rawlings Hall, 128-B

---

Computer Science Tutors
The Computer Science Department provides tutoring services to students, reinforcing learning outside of the classroom. This service is designed to enhance understanding of core computer science concepts and improve problem-solving skills. Tutor information is made available each semester and posted in McMechen Suite 507.

Contact Information:
Dr. Roshan Paudel
Coordinator of the MS in Bioinformatics Program, Professor of Practice
Office: McMechen Hall 507D
Phone: (443) 885-3096
Email: Roshan.Paudel@morgan.edu

Department Tutoring Email: cstutoring@morgan.edu

---

Writing Center
The Writing Center supports undergraduate and graduate students across all disciplines to improve their writing and communication skills. The center offers free tutoring services for a variety of writing assignments, from first-year papers to graduate theses.

To schedule a session, email writingcenter@morgan.edu.

Typical tutoring sessions help with:
- Understanding assignment prompts
- Identifying audience needs
- Organizing and developing ideas
- Source selection and avoiding plagiarism
- Grammar and revision
- Structuring essays and presentations

To schedule an appointment, send an email with your name, a brief description of what you'd like to work on, and your availability.
